modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble inserting an image in Google Docs.

full_description_text: I’m having a hard time trying to insert an image on Google Docs. I just want to add a picture, but I can’t figure out how to do it. It’s really frustrating because I need it for my document, and I’m not sure what to do next.
short_description: Trouble inserting an image in Google Docs.
description: I’m having a hard time trying to insert an image on Google Docs. I just want to add a picture, but I can’t figure out how to do it. It’s really frustrating because I need it for my document, and I’m not sure what to do next.
